labels.analysis: The MCP Server "OpenClaw MCP Ecosystem" provides 3 tools focused on gaming tasks. Core capabilities include data access and reading, search and retrieval. Key tools: get_daily_fortune, get_fortune_ranking, get_all_fortunes.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Gaming" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: score.

tools.name: get_daily_fortune
tools.description: Get daily horoscope and tarot card reading for a zodiac sign. Returns overall score, tarot card, love/work/money/health scores, lucky item/color/number/direction, and personalized message. Available signs: aries, taurus, gemini, cancer, leo, virgo, libra, scorpio, sagittarius, capricorn, aquarius, pisces. Also accepts Japanese names.

tools.name: get_fortune_ranking
tools.description: Get today's zodiac sign ranking from 1st to 12th place with scores and tiers. Great for finding out which signs are luckiest today.

tools.name: get_all_fortunes
tools.description: Get complete fortune data for all 12 zodiac signs including rankings, tarot cards, category scores, and lucky items. Comprehensive daily horoscope overview.
